fields.name: NB / EB
fields.description:
NB = new business (toive asiakkuudesta)
SB = starting business (alkava asiakkuus, ei vielä laskutus)
EB = existing business (asiakassuhde)
LB = lost business (poistunut tai poistuva asiakkuus)

fields.name: Palvelupaketti
fields.description: Classifies the package type based on the MRR value, handling blank and zero values.

options.formula:
IF(
  DATETIME_DIFF(
    NOW(),
    DATETIME_PARSE(
      "01/" & IF(VALUE(LEFT({fldLOfkJ6qMeySBxf}, FIND("-", {fldLOfkJ6qMeySBxf}) - 1)) <= 8, 
        LEFT({fldLOfkJ6qMeySBxf}, FIND("-", {fldLOfkJ6qMeySBxf}) - 1) + 1,
        LEFT({fldLOfkJ6qMeySBxf}, FIND("-", {fldLOfkJ6qMeySBxf}) - 1)
      ) & "/" & "20" & RIGHT({fldLOfkJ6qMeySBxf}, 2),
      "DD/MM/YYYY"
    ),
    "months"
  ) >= 1,
  ({fldY6UMT5wLa67jD5} - {fldPkDjaVwON7mQLD}) * 0.15,
  BLANK()
)

OR(
  AND(MONTH(NOW()) = 9, YEAR(NOW()) = 2025, {fldLOfkJ6qMeySBxf} = "9-25"),
  AND(MONTH(NOW()) = 10, YEAR(NOW()) = 2025, {fldLOfkJ6qMeySBxf} = "10-25"),
  AND(MONTH(NOW()) = 11, YEAR(NOW()) = 2025, {fldLOfkJ6qMeySBxf} = "11-25"),
  AND(MONTH(NOW()) = 12, YEAR(NOW()) = 2025, {fldLOfkJ6qMeySBxf} = "12-25"),
  AND(MONTH(NOW()) = 1, YEAR(NOW()) = 2026, {fldLOfkJ6qMeySBxf} = "1-26"),
  AND(MONTH(NOW()) = 2, YEAR(NOW()) = 2026, {fldLOfkJ6qMeySBxf} = "2-26"),
  AND(MONTH(NOW()) = 3, YEAR(NOW()) = 2026, {fldLOfkJ6qMeySBxf} = "3-26"),
  AND(MONTH(NOW()) = 4, YEAR(NOW()) = 2026, {fldLOfkJ6qMeySBxf} = "4-26"),
  AND(MONTH(NOW()) = 5, YEAR(NOW()) = 2026, {fldLOfkJ6qMeySBxf} = "5-26"),
  AND(MONTH(NOW()) = 6, YEAR(NOW()) = 2026, {fldLOfkJ6qMeySBxf} = "6-26"),
  AND(MONTH(NOW()) = 7, YEAR(NOW()) = 2026, {fldLOfkJ6qMeySBxf} = "7-26"),
  AND(MONTH(NOW()) = 8, YEAR(NOW()) = 2026, {fldLOfkJ6qMeySBxf} = "8-26")
)
